name: NATHANS FAMOUS, INC.
summary: Nathan's Famous, Inc. is a leading branded licensor, wholesaler, and retailer of food products marketed under the Nathan's Famous brand, best known for Nathan's World Famous Beef Hot Dogs. Founded as a nickel hot dog stand on Coney Island in 1916, the company operates through multiple channels including retail licensing, a Branded Product Program, franchised and company-owned quick-service restaurants, and virtual kitchens. Products are sold in approximately 79,000 locations across all 50 U.S. states and twenty foreign countries.

products.name: Nathan's World Famous Beef Hot Dogs
products.description: Flagship premium beef hot dogs sold through retail, foodservice, and restaurant channels across the U.S. and internationally.

products.name: Crinkle-Cut French Fries
products.description: Branded frozen crinkle-cut French fries sold through grocery retail and served in Nathan's Famous restaurants.

products.name: Branded Product Program
products.description: Program allowing foodservice operators to market and sell Nathan's Famous hot dog and specialty products at their venues.

products.name: Branded Menu Program (BMP)
products.description: Franchise program enabling approved foodservice operators to offer a Nathan's Famous menu including hot dogs and fries.

products.name: Arthur Treacher's Fish & Chips
products.description: Branded seafood menu-line extension included in certain Nathan's Famous restaurants and third-party online delivery platforms.

partnerships.description: Manufactures, distributes, markets, and sells Nathan's Famous branded hot dogs through grocery, mass merchandising, and club channels nationwide.
Licensing partner producing Nathan's Famous branded SKUs sold through grocery retail channels.
